acai-bowl.name: Acai Bowl
instructions: Place acai sorbet into a bowl and top with a layer of granola. Line strawberry and banana slices over granola. Sprinkle with coconut flakes and drizzle with honey.

air-fryer-chile-verde-burritos.name: Air Fryer Chile Verde Burritos
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions.
Combine pulled pork, salsa verde, and cojita cheese in a bowl. Stir until evenly combined.

Place a heaping tablespoon of filling into the bottom half of a tortilla. Make 2 folds on either side of the large fold, creating an envelope shape. Roll it up using the tips of your fingers to tuck the filling in as you go. Repeat with remaining tortillas.
Spray the basket of the air fryer with nonstick cooking spray. Place some burritos in the basket seam side-down, making sure to not overcrowd. Spray the tops of the burritos with cooking spray.
Air fry for for 6 minutes. Repeat with remaining burritos. Serve with additional salsa verde for dipping if desired.

air-fryer-panko-crusted-pork-chops.name: Air Fryer Panko-crusted Pork Chops
instructions: Pour 1 cup water in a 4-cup microwave-safe measuring cup. Microwave until boiling, about 4 minutes. Stir in kosher salt and sugar, until dissolved. Add remaining 3 cups water to make a brine.
Place rosemary sprig and bay leaf in a 1-gallon zip-top bag. Carefully pour in brine and add pork chops. Seal the bag, removing as much air as possible, and refrigerate about 2 hours.
Remove chops from the brine and discard the brine. Pat chops dry with paper towels.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Break egg into a shallow bowl and beat lightly. Combine panko, grated Parmesan, Italian seasoning blend, and black pepper, and place on a plate or cutting board. Dip each pork chop in the egg, then coat all sides with the panko mixture. Spray both sides of the coated chops with extra-virgin olive oil.

Place chops in the air fryer in a single layer, with chops not touching, and air-fry for 7 to 8 minutes per side, for a total of 14 to 16 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of the chops should read 63°C (63 degrees C).
Serve warm, garnished with parsley and additional rosemary sprigs, if desired.

air-fryer-roasted-almonds.name: Air Fryer Roasted Almonds
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 325 to 177°C (165 to 175 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions.
Stir water and 3/4 teaspoon pink salt together in a small bowl until salt mostly dissolved.
Place almonds in a medium bowl; stir in salt water until coated. Transfer almonds to the air fryer basket.
Bake in the preheated air fryer for 6 to 7 minutes. Stir almonds, return to the air fryer, air fry until almonds turn brown inside, 5 to 6 minutes more.
Return almonds to same mixing bowl; stir in olive oil and salt until completely coated. Allow to cool before serving,

air-fryer-spinach-and-artichoke-stuffed-.name: Air Fryer Spinach And Artichoke-stuffed Baked Potatoes
instructions: Rub the potatoes all over with the canola oil and season on all sides with ½ teaspoon salt.

Preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200°C).  Working the batches if needed, nestle the potatoes inside of the air fryer basket and set the timer for 45 minutes. Cook, flipping halfway through, until the potatoes have crispy skin and can easily be pierced with a fork.

Meanwhile, make the spinach and artichoke dip: In a medium skillet over medium heat, melt the butter and olive oil together until the butter begins to bubble. Add the onion, garlic, remaining teaspoon of salt, the black pepper, and red pepper flakes. Cook for 2–3 minutes, until the onions are translucent and the garlic is fragrant. Add the artichoke hearts and spinach and cook until the spinach is well incorporated, 1–2 minutes. Stir in the cream cheese and sour cream until fully incorporated, 1–2 minutes. Add 1 cup of mozzarella and the Parmesan cheese and stir until just combined and melted, 1–2 minutes more.

Using tongs, remove the potatoes from the air fryer and cut in half lengthwise. Use a fork to fluff the insides of the potatoes. Top each potato with a heaping ½ cup of the spinach and artichoke dip, then top each with 2 tablespoons of mozzarella cheese.
Working in batches of 2–4 at a time, set the filled potato halves in the air fryer basket. Cook for 5 minutes, until the edges of the potato are browned and the mozzarella is melted and browning.
Enjoy!

all-purpose-pizza-dough.name: All-purpose Pizza Dough

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 2 tsp. honey, ½ tsp. active dry yeast, and 2½ cups water in the bowl of a stand mixer until honey and yeast are dissolved.

Fit bowl onto mixer fitted with the dough hook attachment. Add ⅔ cup (83 g) whole wheat flour and 3 cups (375 g) Italian 00 flour or bread flour and mix on medium-low speed, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until mixture resembles pancake batter, about 4 minutes. Add 3 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. plus 2¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and remaining 3 cups (375 g) Italian 00 flour or bread flour; mix until dough forms a ball, about 2 minutes. Increase speed to high and continue to mix until dough is smooth and sticky and pulls away from sides of bowl, 8–10 minutes more.
Remove bowl from mixer and cover with plastic wrap. Let sit at room temperature 5 hours, then chill at least 12 hours and up to 2 days.
Divide dough into 4 portions and form into balls; place on a lightly oiled baking sheet. Cover with an upturned baking sheet and let sit at room temperature 4 hours.

american-burger-juicy-lucy.name: American Burger “juicy Lucy”
instructions: Mix together the patty ingredients until evenly combined.
Flatten the beef into a thin layer, then place a chunk of cheddar inside, wrapping the beef completely around the cheddar. Form a patty with your hands.
Repeat with the remaining beef and cheese.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Cook the burgers for 3 minutes on the first side, flip, then cook for 6 more minutes.
Assemble the burgers with the bun, bacon, tomato, and lettuce.
Enjoy!

american-french-onion-soup.name: American French Onion Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Melt 1/4 cup butter in a large, oven-safe skillet on medium heat. Stir in onions until they are all coated in butter. Transfer skillet to the preheated oven and cook onions, stirring occasionally, until they are tender and well browned, about 1 hour.

Transfer skillet to the stovetop; cook and stir onions over medium heat until they start to brown and stick to the bottom of the pan, about 5 minutes. Pour sherry and vinegar into the pan, and bring to a boil while scraping browned bits of onion off the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon.

Place caramelized onions in a large soup pot. Pour in chicken broth, beef broth, and thyme. Bring to a boil, skimming off any foam and fat that appear on top. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about an hour. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Preheat the oven's broiler and set the oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source.
Generously brush French bread slices with melted butter. Place on a baking sheet and broil in the preheated oven until crisp and golden, about 5 minutes.
Ladle soup into heat-proof bowls, top each bowl with a piece of toasted bread, sprinkle with 2 to 3 tablespoons of Cheddar cheese and Monterey Jack cheese.
Broil bowls of soup under the broiler until cheese is golden and bubbly, 5 to 6 minutes.

anchovy-mayonnaise.name: Anchovy Mayonnaise

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk egg yolk, mustard, and 1 tsp. lemon juice in a small bowl. Whisking constantly, gradually drizzle in grapeseed oil, then olive oil, drop by drop at first, until mayonnaise is thickened and smooth. Whisk in anchovies and remaining lemon juice; season with salt and pepper. Cover and chill.
DO AHEAD: Mayonnaise can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

annies-white-chocolate-kahlua-creme-brul.name: Annie's White Chocolate-kahlua® Creme Brulee
instructions: Preheat oven to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Whisk egg yolks and 1/3 cup white sugar together in a bowl until smooth.
Bring 1 3/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons heavy cream to a simmer in a saucepan over medium-high heat, about 5 minutes. Add white chocolate. Remove from heat and whisk until chocolate is melted.

Spoon 2 tablespoons of cream mixture into egg yolks, whisking constantly to prevent eggs from scrambling. Pour remaining cream mixture over egg yolks, whisking until custard is thick and smooth. Stir in vanilla extract and coffee liqueur.
Pour custard into four 6-ounce ramekins. Arrange ramekins in a 9x13-inch baking pan. Pour in enough warm water to come 1 1/2 inches up the sides of the ramekins.
Bake in the preheated oven until custard is set, about 45 minutes. Cool to room temperature, about 30 minutes. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled, about 2 hours.
Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Arrange ramekins on a baking sheet. Sprinkle 1 teaspoon white sugar over each custard.
Broil in the preheated oven until sugar is melted and crispy, about 2 minutes. Chill before serving, 5 to 10 minutes.

apple-and-cinnamon-cake-recipe-teleculin.name: Apple And Cinnamon Cake Recipe
apple-and-cinnamon-cake-recipe-teleculin.original_name: Receita de bolo de maçã e canela
instructions: Peel and clean the seed apples, slice them into slices and soak them in water with lemon juice.
Beat the yolks with sugar until you get an off-white cream. Put the butter together and knock some more. Then add the flour, yeast, cinnamon and milk and beat until homogeneous.
On the other hand, beat the clears into castle and gently wrap them in the previous mass. Fill a hole with butter and sprinkle it with flour.

Drop 1/3 of the dough in the form and then 1/3 of the apple. Make two more interspersed layers of pasta and apple and take it to the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 40 minutes. Serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

apple-blondies.name: Apple Blondies

ingredients.item: Peeled and chopped granny smith apples

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Beat brown sugar, white sugar, butter, eggs, and vanilla extract in a bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Add flour and salt; mix well. Stir in apples and walnuts. Pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is dry and edges have started to pull away from the sides of the pan, 30 to 35 minutes. Let blondies cool completely, 20 to 30 minutes. Dust with powdered sugar.

apple-brioche-tart.name: Apple Brioche Tart
instructions: In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook, mix the flour, granulated sugar, and salt on low speed to combine.
Add the yeast and mix to combine, 10 to 15 seconds more.
Add the eggs and milk and mix for 4 minutes. The dough should form a sticky, shaggy ball around the hook.

Increase the speed to medium and slowly add the butter 1 tablespoon at a time, being careful to incorporate each addition before adding the next; the entire process should take about 3 minutes. (If you add the butter too quickly, it can create a greasy disaster in the bowl, so pace it out.)

Scrape the bowl down once or twice to make sure everything is homogeneous. (This mixing period is called intense mixing—and it is! Don’t be alarmed if the mixing is noisy or difficult in the early to mid-stages, it will come together.)
Then knead the dough until it is smooth and uniform, 1 minute more.
Grease a large bowl with nonstick spray. Transfer the dough to the bowl, cover the bowl with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for at least 12 hours.
Use the butter to generously grease an 18-by-13-inch baking sheet, including the rim.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough to a 1/2-inch-thick rectangle a little larger than the pan (about 1 inch on all sides), so that the dough will come up the sides of the pan.
Roll up the dough around the rolling pin and transfer the dough to the prepared baking sheet.
Use a pastry wheel to trim the edges so they are flush with the edges of the pan.
Cover the baking sheet with greased plastic wrap (I use nonstick spray) and let the dough rise in a warm place for 30 to 35 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C / 175°C, with a rack in the middle.
Meanwhile, peel, quarter, and core the apples, then slice crosswise 1/8- to 1/4-inch thick (see Pro Tip).
In a small bowl, whisk together the brown sugar and cinnamon.
Uncover the dough and sprinkle it evenly with half the cinnamon sugar.
Arrange the apple slices across the dough (see Pro Tip).
Sprinkle the remaining cinnamon sugar evenly over the apples. Finish with the salt.
Bake the tart until the edges of the crust are golden brown, the apples are tender when pierced with the tip of a paring knife, and the sugar has caramelized, 32 to 36 minutes.
Cool the tart for at least 15 minutes before slicing and serving, warm or at room temperature.
This tart is best the same day it's made. Store any leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 days.

apple-pie-or-apple-pie-thermomix-pequere.name: Apple Pie Or Apple Pie Thermomix
apple-pie-or-apple-pie-thermomix-pequere.original_name: Tarta de manzana o Apple Pie Thermomix

ingredients.item: 4-5 manzanas (preferiblemente variedades aptas para hornear, como granny smith)
1/2 cucharadita de nuez moscada en polvo

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 and 3. Add flour, cold butter, sugar, egg and salt to the Thermomix glass. Program the Thermomix at Speed 5 for 15 seconds, until the ingredients mix and form a mass. Remove the dough from the glass and form a ball. Wrap them up with film paper and refrigerate them for at least 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, pits apples, remove their heart and cut them into thin cuts. In a separate bowl, mix sugar, flour, cinnamon powder, nutmeg and lemon juice. Add apple slices to blend and gently remove them to cover them well. Stretch two-thirds of the mass onto a pitted surface until its thickness about 3 mm. Fold a cake mold with stretched dough and leave an outstanding edge. Put apple cuts onto the dough and distribute them evenly. In the clear glass of the Thermomix, add topping ingredients: flour, cold butter, brown sugar and cinnamon powder. Program the thermomix at Speed 5 for 10 seconds, till you get an sandy mixture. Drain the topping mixture onto the apples and cover them completely.

Stretch the remaining third of mass and cut it into strips. Put the strips of dough onto the surface of the padded cake. Also you can add some ornament as leaves with the spare dough. Faint the dough with beamed egg and purple the cake for about 45-50 minutes, or until the dough is golden and the apples are tender. Let cool before serving. Can be with an American apple cake with an iced vanilla ball or whipped cream.
apple-pie-or-apple-pie-thermomix-pequere.category: Easy Beer Recipes, Home Stretch Recipes

apple-strudel-comedera.name: Apple Strudel
instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 ° C.
Put raisins in a bowl with an orange liquor and let them macerate till they soften. Take them back their fluids.

Now we start with the base ingredient: Peel apples and cut them into small dice and put them into a bowl next to the sugar. To this blend add the fringes and the lemon juice. Remove this mixture and leave it there.

The best thing about the apple trudel are the plate with a sharp mass (be care that they are very delicate). Go put them on the smooth surface (do not put them on the oven plate). He lays with a brush wet with melted butter each of the sheets that you're about to put up with. Once you have finished pounding up the almonds and raisins and apples that have been booked in the bowl with sugar and lemon.
Wrap up the contents with the edges and make sure you have a gypsy arm shape, that's an elongated wrapper. Now you just have to re-paint with butter above to get them to glow well in the oven.
Put an apple trudel into an oven fountain for 30 minutes at 180 ° C.
After this time get him out and sprinkle with cinnamon and glass sugar.

arancini-recipe-lezzet.name: Arancini Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 cup of arborio rice (or short grain rice)
1 tbsp chicken water or vegetable juice;
1 liter hot chicken/ vegetable suy  u
Salty mortar (can be roasted with salt, pepper)
If you do not find the Arborio rice, you can use honeydo ricenç or ottoç pyrnç
If you want to get lighter brunette ricenç or you can do a different version with bulgur.
Instead of Mozzarella, you can put the cheese, tongue cheese, cheddar or hellim.
You can use old eyebrows or pecorino instead of parmesan.
You can add chopped meat instead of boiled chicken.
Vejetaryen is a choiceyou can put for healing sauce or spinil;
Sade sevenler sadece peynir ve biraz bezelye ekleyebilirler.
Risottoya add aroma interior you can add fresh fesle, thyme, parsley.
You can use a small amount of muskat rende of more dense flavor.
You can use panko bread instead of galeta; it gets more
Instead you can put corn flour; it gives a different texture.
You can bake instead of frying if you want lighter.
You can use vegetable juice instead of chicken water while cooking Risotto.

instructions: 1. Onion and yellowms roast.
2. Add Pirinci, stir up to transparent.
3. Add vegetables/tavuk juice, pulled.
4. Cook the risottoyu cream until it comes to consistency by adding the remaining hot water azar azar.
5. Mix and cool with Parmesan.
6. Stirring risottodan parç take, cheese or inner in the middle; mortar bay, round.
7. Un,   bull and fry and serve the galeta.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

arugula-salad-with-avocado-and-strawberr.name: Arugula Salad With Avocado And Strawberries
arugula-salad-with-avocado-and-strawberr.original_name: Salada de rúcula com abacate e morangos
instructions: Put the arugula in a bowl. Add the avocado, strawberries and laminated onion.
Put the olive oil, balsamic vinegar and mustards in a glass, season with salt and pepper and wrap everything very well until it is turned on.
Regue a salada com o molho e polvilhe com as nozes picadas.
Put the arugula in a bowl. Add the avocado, strawberries and laminated onion.
Put the olive oil, balsamic vinegar and mustards in a glass, season with salt and pepper and wrap everything very well until it is turned on.
Regue a salada com o molho e polvilhe com as nozes picadas.

arugula-peach-and-goat-cheese-flatbread.name: Arugula, Peach, And Goat Cheese Flatbread
instructions: Make the dough: In a large bowl, combine the warm water, yeast, all-purpose and whole wheat flours, and salt. Mix with a rubber spatula until well-combined and the dough comes together into a ball.
Lightly dust a clean surface with flour, then turn the dough out and knead for 1–2 minutes to smooth and encourage gluten development. Shape the dough into a ball.
Drizzle the olive oil in the bowl. Add the dough and turn to coat in the oil. Cover with a kitchen towel and let rise for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.

Caramelize the onions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the onion, ½ teaspoon salt, and the pepper. Sauté for 5 minutes, until slightly softened. Add the balsamic vinegar, stir, and reduce the heat to low. Cook for about 25 minutes more, until the onions are tender and caramelized. Remove the pan from the heat and set aside to cool.
Punch down the dough, then divide into 4 pieces. On a lightly floured surface, roll out each piece to an 8-inch (20 cm) round, about ⅛ inch (3 mm) thick.

Heat a grill pan over medium-high heat. Brush each side of the dough lightly with olive oil. One at a time, grill each flatbread for about 4 minutes on each side, until grill marks appear and the dough is cooked through.
Add the arugula to a medium bowl, along with the caramelized onions, remaining ½ tablespoon olive oil, and remaining ¼ teaspoon salt. Toss well.
Top each flatbread with some of the arugula mixture, 6 peach slices, and 1 ounce of crumbled goat cheese. Drizzle with the balsamic glaze.
Enjoy!

arvidson-swedish-pancakes.name: Arvidson Swedish Pancakes
instructions: Beat eggs in a large bowl until smooth. Add milk, flour, sugar, vanilla extract, nutmeg, and salt; whisk until just combined. Stir in 1/2 cup melted butter until batter is very thin and slightly lumpy.

Heat a nonstick griddle over medium-high heat. Brush generously with 1 teaspoon butter. Drop batter onto the griddle to make 6-inch pancakes. Cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, 30 seconds to 1 minute. Flip and cook until the other side is dry, 30 seconds to 1 minute. Repeat with remaining batter.

asturian-fabada-ingredients-and-preparat.name: Asturian Fabada, Ingredients And Preparation
instructions: Let's start with the most time-consuming step but ironically it's the easiest (although the whole recipe's easy): the dregs of the pieces. The best thing to do is to leave them soaking all night long, so we'll get them a good saucer or big bowl, where they suit with water, with no problems.
Since for the recipe we have to wear lacquer or pancette, we will likely need to get rid of it, depending on the product we have acquired.

After last night, we will be able to continue with our production. It is useful to rinse the fages by removing them from the moist and to make sure that there are no residue scrubbed between the grains, or to remove any grain that does not look good.
Then we will prepare our ingredients for cooking. Let's peel both garlic teeth and onion as well.
We will place these ingredients in a large pot with a good jet of olive oil and we will add the fages and the bay leaf.
Then we'll fill the pot with water, up to the level of the solids, by about a couple of fingers of liquid.
That's how we put up our hot pan. The idea is to let the preparation break to boil, and then add a cold water jet to the pot, so that the frying will get back to normal cooking.
The moment the preparation breaks again, we will add once again a jet of cold water to contain it. We'll do this even a third time.
Once we have been purified for the third time, we have to add "the carrier" or meat to our cooking.

The pot will then be put into the fire for about 3 hours. Nevertheless, we should not forget our preparations. It's necessary to come and monitor her with some frequency to make sure she doesn't run out of fluids. If that happens, we have to rehydrate with more water. It's also necessary to care that the intensity of the fire be between half and low, so that the liquid doesn't evaporate too quickly, and we will be able to use them to remove with a spoon the fat that will be released while cooking them.

When cooking time's about to end, we're gonna have some beans. If necessary, we have to correct the date with salt. If you add this last ingredient, you have to scrape the grains well before turning off the kitchen.

The traditional recipe lovers of an Asturian frying leave a good time of rest after withdrawing this potage from the fire. The time often goes from another complete night and in principle contributes to a more thick consistency of the plate. It's also possible to smash a few pieces with a fork or with a side of the pot to weigh the plate.

Of course, after we have let the frying stand, we will have to re-encourage them. To serve them, the most common thing to do is to have the grains at an honest plate, per person, and to serve a portion of the flesh.

avocado-and-bulgur-salad.name: Avocado And Bulgur Salad
instructions: Bring ¾ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan. Stir in ¾ cup bulgur, ½ tsp. ground cumin, and a pinch of kosher salt, then immediately cover and remove from heat. Let sit 10 minutes. Fluff bulgur with a fork.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook 12 scallions, turning occasionally, until well charred, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board, leaving excess oil behind in pan, and coarsely chop.
Reduce heat to medium; add ½ cup coarsely chopped raw pistachios to same pan. Cook, stirring often, until browned in spots, 1–2 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl; season with salt.

Toss bulgur, scallions, zest and juice of 1 lemon, 1–2 jalapeños, very thinly sliced, depending on your heat preference, ½ cup coarsely chopped cilantro, and remaining 3 Tbsp. olive oil in a large bowl to combine; season with lots of salt and freshly ground black pepper.

Add 2 large avocados, cut into large pieces and 3 cups baby or trimmed mature arugula to salad and toss gently to combine. Divide among plates and top with pistachios and more cilantro; season with more pepper.
